reforms.description: The government has included the objective of later retirement in the 2005 National Plan for Innovation and Full Employment, aiming to bring the effective age of retirement closer to the legal age through various measures.
reforms.package_name: 2005 National Plan for Innovation and Full Employment
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Encouraging later retirement can enhance the labor supply and productivity, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The objective of later retirement has been included in the national plan.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant policy direction aimed at addressing demographic challenges and labor market participation, with potential long-term benefits for the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The authorities are aware of this challenge and have decided to include the objective of later retirement in their 2005 National Plan for Innovation and Full Employment.
